feedback.text: Hello. I would like to request customer protections regarding video games to be added to this initiative. Hundreds of video games have already been destroyed by game publishers due to being always-online and getting shut down, and hundreds more will be too eventually. I am especially worried about games such as Dragonfable and Adventure Quest, which I play frequently. But as they require to connect to servers hosted by the developers, they could get shut down at any moment and be completely unable to be played. Thank you very much.
